name: Suspicious File Execution via MSHTA
description: Detection of mshta.exe executing JavaScript, VBScript, or other abnormal file types via its command line, indicating potential defense evasion or malicious code execution.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when mshta.exe was executed.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the mshta.exe executable.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line arguments of mshta.exe.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which mshta.exe was executed.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process of mshta.exe.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
